# valuePending

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the configuration item’s value is ready for display.

## Declaration

```swift
var valuePending: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Set this property to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if a progress indicator should be displayed, to show users that a configuration item’s value is about to display. The default value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Specifying Configuration Information

- **title**: The name of the configuration item stored as a localized string.
- **value**: The current value or setting of the configuration item.

items.description: The name of the configuration item stored as a localized string.
items.name: title

items.description: The current value or setting of the configuration item.
items.name: value

title: valuePending
